name: Slow Simmered Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rice wine, Chinese or - use dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all the ingredients except the pork.
2. Place the meat in an ovenproof casserole just large enough to hold it. A crockpot may also be used.
3. Pour the sauce over the top of the meat.
4. Cover the dish and bake at 275 degrees for 5 to 8 hours, depending on your taste preferences.
